title: Docs: INSTALL.md rewrite + README/SKILL.md global-sync claims corrected
action: INSTALL.md: per-project layout documented as default for both runtimes (.claude/skills for Claude Code, .agents/skills for Codex - repo-level; ~/.codex/skills legacy), global route under an opt-in --global-skills section, troubleshooting row for the PS 5.1 encoding symptom. README.md ~:367 and ~:428: rewrite global-only sync claims with the per-project story. bee-hive SKILL.md :31 'Every --apply also syncs the global bee skill set' corrected. Historical decision docs untouched.

truths: No current-behavior doc still claims skills sync ONLY to ~/.claude/skills
INSTALL.md codex section names .agents/skills as the repo-level path

verify: ! grep -n 'mirrors the global skill set' README.md && grep -q '.agents/skills' INSTALL.md

trace.outcome: INSTALL.md rewritten for per-project skill sync as default (flags table, two-layers story, Claude Code + Codex Option B manual-copy sections, onboarding flags, install tree, verify section, PS1-parse troubleshooting row); README.md :367 and :428 global-only sync claims corrected to describe per-project default + --global-skills opt-in; skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md :31 checked, already correct from ih-2, no change needed.
trace.verify_output: PASS: no 'mirrors the global skill set' claim remains in README.md (grep -n found nothing, negated grep exits 0); INSTALL.md contains '.agents/skills' (grep -q exits 0). Combined command exit 0 = both conditions true.
